message:
fix(share): skip all symlinks during ZIP bundle collection to prevent directory traversal

Previously, collect_entries skipped symlinked directories but still
collected symlinked files, relying on canonicalization guards in
package_directory_as_zip to catch escaping symlinks. This was fragile —
symlinked files could still be followed during metadata collection using
std::fs::metadata (which resolves symlinks), potentially leaking
information about paths outside the source tree.

Now all symlinks are skipped unconditionally during collection. The
subsequent is_file() check uses the already-obtained symlink_metadata,
so only regular files are included. This is a defense-in-depth
improvement — the canonicalization + starts_with guard in
package_directory_as_zip remains as a second layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
